---
title: "test_utils_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_utils_empire.py"
loc: 13
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.20
style_score: 4.15
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.42
---

## Intent
The `test_utils_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_load_config_missing, test_load_config_valid, test_sanitize_query. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_load_config_missing, test_load_config_valid, test_sanitize_query. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [src.core.utils](file://src.core.utils)

### Exports
- `test_load_config_missing`
- `test_load_config_valid`
- `test_sanitize_query`
